source: skymutations.eu JS bundle (X array) + wiki screenshots for COMMON grids
note: Grid layouts for COMMON mutations verified from wiki screenshots. All others derived from spreading_conditions and size fields.

PHANTOMLEAF.name: Phantomleaf

effects.name: XP Boost
effects.description: Increases Farming XP of adjacent crops by +20%

effects.name: Immunity
effects.description: Provides Immunity to negative effects.

PHANTOMLEAF.specialMechanic: When harvested, will hide disguised as another plant somewhere on your greenhouse. Must be found within 1 minute to successfully harvest.

TIMESTALK.name: Timestalk

effects.name: Improved Water Retain
effects.description: Retains watering status of adjacent crops by +100%

effects.name: Improved XP Boost
effects.description: Increases Farming XP of adjacent crops by +30%

effects.name: Harvest Loss
effects.description: Decreases Yield by -20%

TIMESTALK.specialMechanic: Grows in reverse, and spawns a Timestalk Clone of you when harvested

effects.name: Improved Harvest Boost
effects.description: Increases Yield by +30%

effects.description: Retains watering status of adjacent crops by +100%

effects.name: Improved XP Boost
effects.description: Increases Farming XP of adjacent crops by +30%

effects.name: Immunity
effects.description: Provides Immunity to negative effects.

effects.name: Bonus Drops
effects.description: Harvested items additionally roll from an extra loot pool.

effects.name: Effect Spread
effects.description: Spreads other buffs and debuffs on the current crop to adjacent crops.

JERRYFLOWER.name: Jerryflower
JERRYFLOWER.specialMechanic:
Obtain an Unfulfilled Jerryseed from the Jerry Visitor
Give the Unfulfilled Jerryseed and a Mysterious Crop to Xalx in the Crystal Hollows to get an Unripe Jerryseed
Reforge the Unripe Jerryseed to Dirty and show it to Dirt Guy in the Dwarven Mines to get a Fertilized Jerryseed
Plant the Fertilized Jerryseed in the Greenhouse and feed it 10x Move Jerrys when it reaches growth stage 5 to get a Jerryflower

DEVOURER.name: Devourer

effects.name: Bonus Drops
effects.description: Harvested items additionally roll from an extra loot pool.

effects.name: Improved Harvest Boost
effects.description: Increases Yield by +30%

effects.name: Water Drain
effects.description: Reduces watering status of nearby crops by -30%

DEVOURER.specialMechanic: Spreads roots and overtakes other plants on your garden while it grows

ALL_IN_ALOE.name: All-in Aloe

effects.description: Increases Yield by +20%

ALL_IN_ALOE.specialMechanic: Gives more All-in Aloe Fragments the longer it grows, but has an increasing chance to reset every time it grows
